prompt:
Create a premium surreal 3D editorial environment scene with no people.

A vibrant abstract environment made of large glossy organic 3D shapes, inflatable forms, rounded blobs, soft tubular rings, bubble clusters, oversized flower-like balloon elements and reflective chrome spheres.

Color palette:
pastel aqua blue
mint turquoise
soft cyan
neon-lime green
fresh light green

Materials:
glossy smooth plastic
translucent gel
inflated vinyl
soft-touch rubber
fuzzy grass-like surfaces
polished chrome metal spheres

Composition:
Create a completely new composition every time.
Do not repeat previous layouts.
Use asymmetrical placement of shapes.
Mix foreground, midground and background elements.
Large hero shapes frame open negative space in the center for a future portrait.

Lighting:
high-end advertising photography,
soft studio lighting,
bright pastel reflections,
subtle rim light,
clean highlights,
luxury beauty campaign quality.

Style references:
modern CGI,
premium 3D illustration,
playful futuristic design,
Apple-style cleanliness,
Behance award-winning visual direction,
surreal editorial set design.

Depth:
strong foreground objects,
layered composition,
shallow depth of field,
realistic shadows and contact lighting.

Quality:
ultra detailed,
photoreal CGI,
4K,
commercial campaign quality.

Vertical 9:16 portrait. No people, no faces, no human figures, no silhouettes, no body parts. Do not add text, logos, subtitles, or watermarks. Single cohesive image.
